title: nepeta wuana
intro: Nepeta wuana, also known as Wuana Catmint, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family and is native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Nepeta wuana include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and headaches, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cognitive function. In herbal preparations, Nepeta wuana can be consumed as a tea, used in infusions, or applied topically as a poultice to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
